URL matches expected pattern (if provided)\n * - Page is in a ready state\n *\n * @param {Object} options - Verification options\n * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n * @param {string} options.expectedUrl - Expected URL or URL pattern (optional)\n * @param {string} options.startUrl - URL before navigation\n * @returns {Promise<{verified: boolean, actualUrl: string, reason: string}>}\n */\nexport async function defaultNavigationVerification(options = {}) {\n  const { page, expectedUrl, startUrl } = options;\n\n  try {\n    const actualUrl = page.url();\n\n    // If expected URL is provided, verify it matches\n    if (expectedUrl) {\n      // Check for exact match or pattern match\n      if (actualUrl === expectedUrl) {\n        return { verified: true, actualUrl, reason: 'exact URL match' };\n      }\n      // Check if expected URL is contained in actual URL (for patterns)\n      if (\n        actualUrl.includes(expectedUrl) ||\n        actualUrl.startsWith(expectedUrl)\n      ) {\n        return { verified: true, actualUrl, reason: 'URL pattern match' };\n      }\n      // Check if it's a regex pattern\n      if (expectedUrl instanceof RegExp && expectedUrl.test(actualUrl)) {\n        return { verified: true, actualUrl, reason: 'URL regex match' };\n      }\n\n      return {\n        verified: false,\n        actualUrl,\n        reason: `URL mismatch: expected \"${expectedUrl}\", got \"${actualUrl}\"`,\n      };\n    }\n\n    // No expected URL - just verify URL changed from start\n    if (startUrl && actualUrl !== startUrl) {\n      return { verified: true, actualUrl, reason: 'URL changed from start' };\n    }\n\n    // If no start URL and no expected URL, assume success\n    return { verified: true, actualUrl, reason: 'navigation completed' };\n  } catch (error) {\n    if (isNavigationError(error) || isActionStoppedError(error)) {\n      return {\n        verified: false,\n        actualUrl: '',\n        reason: 'error during verification',\n        navigationError: true,\n      };\n    }\n    throw error;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Verify navigation operation with retry logic\n * @param {Object} options - Verification options\n * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n * @param {string} options.expectedUrl - Expected URL (optional)\n * @param {string} options.startUrl - URL before navigation\n * @param {Function} options.verifyFn - Custom verification function (optional)\n * @param {number} options.timeout - Verification timeout in ms (default: TIMING.VERIFICATION_TIMEOUT)\n * @param {number} options.retryInterval - Interval between retries (default: TIMING.VERIFICATION_RETRY_INTERVAL)\n * @param {Function} options.log - Logger instance\n * @returns {Promise<{verified: boolean, actualUrl: string, reason: string, attempts: number}>}\n */\nexport async function verifyNavigation(options = {}) {\n  const {\n    page,\n    expectedUrl,\n    startUrl,\n    verifyFn = defaultNavigationVerification,\n    timeout = TIMING.VERIFICATION_TIMEOUT,\n    retryInterval = TIMING.VERIFICATION_RETRY_INTERVAL,\n    log = { debug: () => {} },\n  } = options;\n\n  const startTime = Date.now();\n  let attempts = 0;\n  let lastResult = { verified: false, actualUrl: '', reason: '' };\n\n  while (Date.now() - startTime < timeout) {\n    attempts++;\n    lastResult = await verifyFn({\n      page,\n      expectedUrl,\n      startUrl,\n    });\n\n    if (lastResult.verified) {\n      log.debug(\n        () =>\n          `✅ Navigation verification succeeded after ${attempts} attempt(s): ${lastResult.reason}`\n      );\n      return { ...lastResult, attempts };\n    }\n\n    if (lastResult.navigationError) {\n      log.debug(() => '⚠️  Navigation/stop detected during verification');\n      return { ...lastResult, attempts };\n    }\n\n    // Wait before next retry\n    await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, retryInterval));\n  }\n\n  log.debug(\n    () =>\n      `❌ Navigation verification failed after ${attempts} attempts: ${lastResult.reason}`\n  );\n  return { ...lastResult, attempts };\n}\n\n/**\n * Wait for URL to stabilize (no redirects happening)\n * This is a legacy polling-based approach for backwards compatibility.\n * When navigationManager is available, use waitForPageReady instead.\n *\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n * @param {Function} options.log - Logger instance\n * @param {Function} options.wait - Wait function\n * @param {Object} options.navigationManager - NavigationManager instance (optional)\n * @param {number} options.stableChecks - Number of consecutive stable checks required (default: 3)\n * @param {number} options.checkInterval - Interval between stability checks in ms (default: 1000)\n * @param {number} options.timeout - Maximum time to wait for stabilization in ms (default: 30000)\n * @param {string} options.reason - Reason for stabilization (for logging)\n * @returns {Promise<boolean>} - True if stabilized, false if timeout\n */\nexport async function waitForUrlStabilization(options = {}) {\n  const {\n    page,\n    log,\n    wait,\n    navigationManager,\n    stableChecks = 3,\n    checkInterval = 1000,\n    timeout = 30000,\n    reason = 'URL stabilization',\n  } = options;\n\n  // If NavigationManager is available, delegate to it\n  if (navigationManager) {\n    return navigationManager.waitForPageReady({ timeout, reason });\n  }\n\n  // Legacy polling-based approach\n  log.debug(() => `⏳ Waiting for URL to stabilize (${reason})...`);\n  let stableCount = 0;\n  let lastUrl = page.url();\n  const startTime = Date.now();\n\n  while (stableCount < stableChecks) {\n    // Check timeout\n    if (Date.now() - startTime > timeout) {\n      log.debug(\n        () => `⚠️  URL stabilization timeout after ${timeout}ms (${reason})`\n      );\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    await wait({ ms: checkInterval, reason: 'checking URL stability' });\n    const currentUrl = page.url();\n\n    if (currentUrl === lastUrl) {\n      stableCount++;\n      log.debug(\n        () =>\n          `🔍 [VERBOSE] URL stable for ${stableCount}/${stableChecks} checks: ${currentUrl}`\n      );\n    } else {\n      stableCount = 0;\n      lastUrl = currentUrl;\n      log.debug(\n        () =>\n          `🔍 [VERBOSE] URL changed to: ${currentUrl}, resetting stability counter`\n      );\n    }\n  }\n\n  log.debug(() => `✅ URL stabilized (${reason})`);\n  return true;\n}\n\n/**\n * Navigate to URL with full wait for page ready\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n * @param {Function} options.waitForUrlStabilization - URL stabilization function (legacy)\n * @param {Object} options.navigationManager - NavigationManager instance (preferred)\n * @param {Function} options.log - Logger instance (optional)\n * @param {string} options.url - URL to navigate to\n * @param {string} options.waitUntil - Wait until condition (default: 'domcontentloaded')\n * @param {boolean} options.waitForStableUrlBefore - Wait for URL to stabilize BEFORE navigation (default: true)\n * @param {boolean} options.waitForStableUrlAfter - Wait for URL to stabilize AFTER navigation (default: true)\n * @param {boolean} options.waitForNetworkIdle - Wait for all network requests to complete (default: true)\n * @param {number} options.stableChecks - Number of consecutive stable checks required (default: 3)\n * @param {number} options.checkInterval - Interval between stability checks in ms (default: 1000)\n * @param {number} options.timeout - Navigation timeout in ms (default: 240000)\n * @param {boolean} options.verify - Whether to verify the navigation (default: true)\n * @param {Function} options.verifyFn - Custom verification function (optional)\n * @param {number} options.verificationTimeout - Verification timeout in ms (default: TIMING.VERIFICATION_TIMEOUT)\n * @returns {Promise<{navigated: boolean, verified: boolean, actualUrl?: string, reason?: string}>}\n */\nexport async function goto(options = {}) {\n  const {\n    page,\n    waitForUrlStabilization: stabilizeFn,\n    navigationManager,\n    log = { debug: () => {} },\n    url,\n    waitUntil = 'domcontentloaded',\n    waitForStableUrlBefore = true,\n    waitForStableUrlAfter = true,\n    waitForNetworkIdle = true,\n    stableChecks = 3,\n    checkInterval = 1000,\n    timeout = 240000,\n    verify = true,\n    verifyFn,\n    verificationTimeout = TIMING.VERIFICATION_TIMEOUT,\n  } = options;\n\n  if (!url) {\n    throw new Error('url is required in options');\n  }\n\n  const startUrl = page.url();\n\n  // If NavigationManager is available, use it for full navigation handling\n  if (navigationManager) {\n    try {\n      const navigated = await navigationManager.navigate({\n        url,\n        waitUntil,\n        timeout,\n      });\n\n      // Verify navigation if requested\n      if (verify && navigated) {\n        const verificationResult = await verifyNavigation({\n          page,\n          expectedUrl: url,\n          startUrl,\n          verifyFn,\n          timeout: verificationTimeout,\n          log,\n        });\n\n        return {\n          navigated: true,\n          verified: verificationResult.verified,\n          actualUrl: verificationResult.actualUrl,\n          reason: verificationResult.reason,\n        };\n      }\n\n      return { navigated, verified: navigated, actualUrl: page.url() };\n    } catch (error) {\n      if (isNavigationError(error) || isActionStoppedError(error)) {\n        // Navigation was stopped by page trigger or navigation error\n        // This is not a failure - it means another action took over\n        return {\n          navigated: false,\n          verified: false,\n          reason: 'navigation stopped/interrupted',\n        };\n      }\n      throw error;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Legacy approach without NavigationManager\n  try {\n    // Wait for URL to stabilize BEFORE navigation (to avoid interrupting natural redirects)\n    if (waitForStableUrlBefore && stabilizeFn) {\n      await stabilizeFn({\n        stableChecks,\n        checkInterval,\n        reason: 'before navigation',\n      });\n    }\n\n    // Navigate to the URL\n    await page.goto(url, { waitUntil, timeout });\n\n    // Wait for URL to stabilize AFTER navigation (to ensure all redirects are complete)\n    if (waitForStableUrlAfter && stabilizeFn) {\n      await stabilizeFn({\n        stableChecks,\n        checkInterval,\n        reason: 'after navigation',\n      });\n    }\n\n    // Verify navigation if requested\n    if (verify) {\n      const verificationResult = await verifyNavigation({\n        page,\n        expectedUrl: url,\n        startUrl,\n        verifyFn,\n        timeout: verificationTimeout,\n        log,\n      });\n\n      return {\n        navigated: true,\n        verified: verificationResult.verified,\n        actualUrl: verificationResult.actualUrl,\n        reason: verificationResult.reason,\n      };\n    }\n\n    return { navigated: true, verified: true, actualUrl: page.url() };\n  } catch (error) {\n    if (isNavigationError(error) || isActionStoppedError(error)) {\n      console.log(\n        '⚠️  Navigation was interrupted/stopped, recovering gracefully'\n      );\n      return {\n        navigated: false,\n        verified: false,\n        reason: 'navigation interrupted/stopped',\n      };\n    }\n    throw error;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Wait for navigation\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n * @param {Object} options.navigationManager - NavigationManager instance (optional)\n * @param {number} options.timeout - Timeout in ms\n * @returns {Promise<boolean>} - True if navigation completed, false on error\n */\nexport async function waitForNavigation(options = {}) {\n  const { page, navigationManager, timeout } = options;\n\n  // If NavigationManager is available, use it\n  if (navigationManager) {\n    return navigationManager.waitForNavigation({ timeout });\n  }\n\n  // Legacy approach\n  try {\n    await page.waitForNavigation(timeout ? { timeout } : undefined);\n    return true;\n  } catch (error) {\n    if (isNavigationError(error)) {\n      console.log(\n        '⚠️  waitForNavigation was interrupted, continuing gracefully'\n      );\n      return false;\n    }\n    throw error;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Wait for page to be fully ready (DOM loaded + network idle + no redirects)\n * This is the recommended method for ensuring page is ready for manipulation.\n *\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n * @param {Object} options.navigationManager - NavigationManager instance (required for full functionality)\n * @param {Object} options.networkTracker - NetworkTracker instance (optional)\n * @param {Function} options.log - Logger instance\n * @param {Function} options.wait - Wait function\n * @param {number} options.timeout - Maximum time to wait (default: 30000ms)\n * @param {string} options.reason - Reason for waiting (for logging)\n * @returns {Promise<boolean>} - True if ready, false if timeout\n */\nexport async function waitForPageReady(options = {}) {\n  const {\n    page,\n    navigationManager,\n    networkTracker,\n    log,\n    wait,\n    timeout = 30000,\n    reason = 'page ready',\n  } = options;\n\n  // If NavigationManager is available, delegate to it\n  if (navigationManager) {\n    return navigationManager.waitForPageReady({ timeout, reason });\n  }\n\n  // Fallback: use network tracker directly if available\n  if (networkTracker) {\n    log.debug(() => `⏳ Waiting for page ready (${reason})...`);\n    const startTime = Date.now();\n\n    // Wait for network idle\n    const networkIdle = await networkTracker.waitForNetworkIdle({\n      timeout,\n    });\n\n    const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;\n    if (networkIdle) {\n      log.debug(() => `✅ Page ready after ${elapsed}ms (${reason})`);\n    } else {\n      log.debug(() => `⚠️  Page ready timeout after ${elapsed}ms (${reason})`);\n    }\n\n    return networkIdle;\n  }\n\n  // Minimal fallback: just wait a bit for DOM to settle\n  log.debug(() => `⏳ Waiting for page ready - minimal mode (${reason})...`);\n  await wait({ ms: 1000, reason: 'page settle time' });\n  return true;\n}\n\n/**\n * Wait for any ongoing navigation and network requests to complete.\n * Use this after actions that might trigger navigation (like clicks).\n *\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n * @param {Object} options.navigationManager - NavigationManager instance\n * @param {Object} options.networkTracker - NetworkTracker instance\n * @param {Function} options.log - Logger instance\n * @param {Function} options.wait - Wait function\n * @param {number} options.navigationCheckDelay - Time to wait for potential navigation to start (default: 500ms)\n * @param {number} options.timeout - Maximum time to wait (default: 30000ms)\n * @param {string} options.reason - Reason for waiting (for logging)\n * @returns {Promise<{navigated: boolean, ready: boolean}>}\n */\nexport async function waitAfterAction(options = {}) {\n  const {\n    page,\n    navigationManager,\n    networkTracker,\n    log,\n    wait,\n    navigationCheckDelay = 500,\n    timeout = 30000,\n    reason = 'after action',\n  } = options;\n\n  const startUrl = page.url();\n  const startTime = Date.now();\n\n  log.debug(() => `⏳ Waiting after action (${reason})...`);\n\n  // Wait briefly for potential navigation to start\n  await wait({ ms: navigationCheckDelay, reason: 'checking for navigation' });\n\n  // Check if navigation is in progress or URL changed\n  const currentUrl = page.url();\n  const urlChanged = currentUrl !== startUrl;\n\n  if (navigationManager && navigationManager.isNavigating()) {\n    log.debug(() => '🔄 Navigation in progress, waiting for completion...');\n    await navigationManager.waitForNavigation({\n      timeout: timeout - (Date.now() - startTime),\n    });\n    return { navigated: true, ready: true };\n  }\n\n  if (urlChanged) {\n    log.debug(() => `🔄 URL changed: ${startUrl} → ${currentUrl}`);\n\n    // Wait for page to be fully ready\n    await waitForPageReady({\n      page,\n      navigationManager,\n      networkTracker,\n      log,\n      wait,\n      timeout: timeout - (Date.now() - startTime),\n      reason: 'after URL change',\n    });\n\n    return { navigated: true, ready: true };\n  }\n\n  // No navigation detected, just wait for network idle\n  // Use shorter idle time since this is just for XHR completion, not full page load\n  if (networkTracker) {\n    const idle = await networkTracker.waitForNetworkIdle({\n      timeout: Math.max(0, timeout - (Date.now() - startTime)),\n      idleTime: 2000, // Shorter idle time for non-navigation actions\n    });\n    return { navigated: false, ready: idle };\n  }\n\n  return { navigated: false, ready: true };\n}\n","numLines":514,"startLine":1,"totalLines":514}}}

258→ * @returns {Promise<{navigated: boolean, newUrl: string}>}\n   259→ */\n   260→async function detectNavigation(options = {}) {\n   261→  const { page, navigationManager, startUrl, log } = 267→    log.debug(() => '🔄 Navigation detected via NavigationManager');\n   268→    return { navigated: true, newUrl: currentUrl };\n   269→  }\n   270→\n   271→  if (urlChanged) {\n   272→    log.debug(() => `🔄 URL changed: ${startUrl} → ${currentUrl}`);\n   273→    return { navigated: true, newUrl: currentUrl };\n   274→  }\n   275→\n   276→  return { navigated: false, newUrl: currentUrl };\n   277→}\n   278→\n   279→/**\n   280→ * Prepare element for clicking - find, validate, and optionally scroll into view\n   281→ * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n   282→ * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n   283→ * @param {string} options.engine - Engine type\n   284→ * @param {Function} options.wait - Wait function\n   285→ * @param {Function} options.log - Logger instance\n   286→ * @param {boolean} options.verbose - Enable verbose logging\n   287→ * @param {string|Object} options.selector - CSS selector, ElementHandle, or Playwright Locator\n   288→ * options.smoothScroll - Use smooth scroll animation\n   291→ * @param {number} options.timeout - Timeout in ms\n   292→ * @returns {Promise<{locatorOrElement: Object, scrolled: boolean, navigated: boolean}>}\n   293→ */\n   294→async function prepareElement(options = {}) {\n   295→  const {\n   296→    page,\n   297→    engine,\n   298→    wait,\n   299→    log,\n   300→    verbose = false,\n   301→    selector,\n   302→    scrollIntoView: shouldScroll = true,\n   303→    waitAfterScroll,\n   304→    smoothScroll = true,\n   305→    timeout,\n   306→  } = options;\n   307→\n   308→  // Get locator/element and wait for it to be visible (unified for both engines)\n   309→  const locatorOrElement = await waitForLocatorOrElement({\n   310→    page,\n   311→    engine,\n   312→    selector,\n   313→    timeout,\n   314→  });\n   315→\n   316→  // Log element info if verbose\n   317→  if (verbose) {\n   318→    await logElementInfo({ page, engine, log, locatorOrElement });\n   319→  }\n   320→\n   321→  // Scroll into view (if requested and needed)\n   322→  if (shouldScroll) {\n   323→    const behavior = smoothScroll ? 'smooth' : 'instant';\n   324→    const scrollResult = await scrollIntoViewIfNeeded({\n   325→      page,\n   326→      engine,\n   327→      wait,\n   328→      log,\n   329→      locatorOrElement,\n   330→      behavior,\n   331→      waitAfterScroll,\n   332→      verify: false, // Don't verify scroll here, we verify the overall click\n   333→    });\n   334→    // Check if scroll was aborted due to navigation/stop\n   335→    if (!scrollResult.skipped && !scrollResult.scrolled) {\n   336→      return { locatorOrElement: null, scrolled: false, navigated: true };\n   337→    }\n   338→    return { locatorOrElement, scrolled: true, navigated: false };\n   339→  } else {\n   340→    log.debug(() => `🔍 [VERBOSE] Skipping scroll (scrollIntoView: false)`);\n   341→    return { locatorOrElement, scrolled: false, navigated: false };\n   342→  }\n   343→}\n   344→\n   345→/**\n   346→ * Execute the click operation with verification\n   347→ * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n   348→ * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n   349→ * @param {string} options.engine - Engine type\n   350→ * @param {Function} options.log - Logger instance\n   351→ * @param {Object} options.locatorOrElement - Element or locator to click\n   352→ * @param {boolean} options.noAutoScroll - Prevent Playwright's automatic scrolling\n   353→ * @param {boolean} options.verify - Whether to verify the click operation\n   354→ * @param {Function} options.verifyFn - Custom verification function (optional)\n   355→ * @returns {Promise<{clicked: boolean, verified: boolean, reason?: string, navigated: boolean}>}\n   356→ */\n   357→async function executeClick(options = {}) {\n   358→  const {\n   359→    page,\n   360→    engine,\n   361→    log,\n   362→    locatorOrElement,\n   363→    noAutoScroll = false,\n   364→    verify = true,\n   365→    verifyFn,\n   366→  } = options;\n   367→\n   368→  log.debug(() => `🔍 [VERBOSE] About to click element`);\n   369→\n   370→  const clickResult = await clickElement({\n   371→    page,\n   372→    engine,\n   373→    log,\n   374→    locatorOrElement,\n   375→    noAutoScroll,\n   376→    verify,\n   377→    verifyFn,\n   378→  });\n   379→\n   380→  if (!clickResult.clicked) {\n   381→    // Navigation/stop occurred during click itself\n   382→    return {\n   383→      clicked: false,\n   384→      verified: true,\n   385→      navigated: true,\n   386→      reason: 'navigation during click',\n   387→    };\n   388→  }\n   389→\n   390→  log.debug(() => `🔍 [VERBOSE] Click completed`);\n   391→\n   392→  return {\n   393→    clicked: true,\n   394→    verified: clickResult.verified,\n   395→    navigated: false,\n   396→    reason: clickResult.reason,\n   397→  };\n   398→}\n   399→\n   400→/**\n   401→ * Handle navigation detection and waiting after a click\n   402→ * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n   403→ * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n   404→ * @param {Function} options.wait - Wait function\n   405→ * @param {Function} options.log - Logger instance\n   406→ * @param {Object} options.navigationManager - NavigationManager instance (optional)\n   407→ * @param {Object} options.networkTracker - NetworkTracker instance (optional)\n   408→ * @param {string} options.startUrl - URL before click\n   409→ * @param {boolean} options.waitForNavigation - Wait for navigation to complete\n   410→ * @param {number} options.navigationCheckDelay - Time to check if navigation started\n   411→ * @param {number} options.waitAfterClick - Wait time after click in ms\n   412→ * @returns {Promise<{navigated: boolean, verified: boolean, reason: string}>}\n   413→ */\n   414→async function handleNavigationAfterClick(options = {}) {\n   415→  const {\n   416→    page,\n   417→    wait,\n   418→    log,\n   419→    navigationManager,\n   420→    networkTracker,\n   421→    startUrl,\n   422→    waitForNavigation = true,\n   423→    navigationCheckDelay = 500,\n   424→    waitAfterClick = 1000,\n   425→  } = options;\n   426→\n   427→  // Check if click caused navigation\n   428→  if (waitForNavigation) {\n   429→    // Wait briefly for navigation to potentially start\n   430→    await wait({\n   431→      ms: navigationCheckDelay,\n   432→      reason: 'checking for navigation after click',\n   433→    });\n   434→\n   435→    // Detect if navigation occurred\n   436→    const { navigated, newUrl } = await detectNavigation({\n   437→      page,\n   438→      navigationManager,\n   439→      startUrl,\n   440→      log,\n   441→    });\n   442→\n   443→    if (navigated) {\n   444→      log.debug(() => `🔄 Click triggered navigation to: ${newUrl}`);\n   445→\n   446→      // Wait for page to be fully ready (network idle + no more redirects)\n   447→      // Note: If navigationManager detected external navigation, it's already waiting\n   448→      // We still call waitForPageReady here to ensure we don't return until page is ready\n   449→      if (navigationManager) {\n   450→        // Use longer timeout (120s) for full page loads after click-triggered navigation\n   451→        await navigationManager.waitForPageReady({\n   452→          timeout: 120000,\n   453→          reason: 'after click navigation',\n   454→        });\n   455→      } else if (networkTracker) {\n   456→        // Without navigation manager, use network tracker directly with 30s idle time\n   457→        await networkTracker.waitForNetworkIdle({\n   458→          timeout: 120000,\n   459→          // idleTime defaults to 30000ms from tracker config\n   460→        });\n   461→      } else {\n   462→        // Fallback: wait a bit for page to settle\n   463→        await wait({ ms: 2000, reason: 'page settle after navigation' });\n   464→      }\n   465→\n   466→      // Navigation is considered successful verification\n   467→      return {\n   468→        navigated: true,\n   469→        verified: true,\n   470→        reason: 'click triggered navigation',\n   471→      };\n   472→    }\n   473→  }\n   474→\n   475→  // No navigation - wait after click if specified (useful for modals)\n   476→  if (waitAfterClick > 0) {\n   477→    const waitResult = await wait({\n   478→      ms: waitAfterClick,\n   479→      reason: 'post-click settling time for modal scroll capture',\n   480→    });\n   481→\n   482→    // Check if wait was aborted due to navigation that happened during the wait\n   483→    if (waitResult && waitResult.aborted) {\n   484→      log.debug(\n   485→        () => '🔄 Navigation detected during post-click wait (wait was aborted)'\n   486→      );\n   487→\n   488→      // Re-check for navigation since it happened during the wait\n   489→      const { navigated: lateNavigated, newUrl: lateUrl } =\n   490→        await detectNavigation({\n   491→          page,\n   492→          navigationManager,\n   493→          startUrl,\n   494→          log,\n   495→        });\n   496→\n   497→      if (lateNavigated) {\n   498→        log.debug(() => `🔄 Confirmed late navigation to: ${lateUrl}`);\n   499→\n   500→        // Wait for page to be fully ready\n   501→        if (navigationManager) {\n   502→          await navigationManager.waitForPageReady({\n   503→            timeout: 120000,\n   504→            reason: 'after late-detected click navigation',\n   505→          });\n   506→        }\n   507→\n   508→        return {\n   509→          navigated: true,\n   510→          verified: true,\n   511→          reason: 'late-detected navigation',\n   512→        };\n   513→      }\n   514→    }\n   515→  }\n   516→\n   517→  // Final check: did navigation happen while we were processing?\n   518→  // This catches cases where navigation started but wasn't detected earlier\n   519→  if (navigationManager && navigationManager.shouldAbort()) {\n   520→    log.debug(\n   521→      () => '🔄 Navigation detected via abort signal at end of click processing'\n   522→    );\n   523→\n   524→    await navigationManager.waitForPageReady({\n   525→      timeout: 120000,\n   526→      reason: 'after abort-detected click navigation',\n   527→    });\n   528→\n   529→    return {\n   530→      navigated: true,\n   531→      verified: true,\n   532→      reason: 'abort-signal navigation',\n   533→    };\n   534→  }\n   535→\n   536→  // If we have network tracking, wait for any XHR/fetch to complete\n   537→  // Use shorter idle time for non-navigation clicks (just waiting for XHR, not full page load)\n   538→  if (networkTracker) {\n   539→    await networkTracker.waitForNetworkIdle({\n   540→      timeout: 10000, // Maximum wait time\n   541→      idleTime: 2000, // Only 2 seconds of idle needed for XHR completion\n   542→    });\n   543→  }\n   544→\n   545→  return { navigated: false, verified: true, reason: 'no navigation detected' };\n   546→}\n   547→\n   548→/**\n   549→ * Click a button or element (high-level with scrolling and waits)\n   550→ * Now navigation-aware - automatically waits for page ready after navigation-causing clicks.\n   551→ *\n   552→ * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n   553→ * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n   554→ * @param {string} options.engine - Engine type ('playwright' or 'puppeteer')\n   555→ * @param {Function} options.wait - Wait function\n   556→ * @param {Function} options.log - Logger instance\n   557→ * @param {boolean} options.verbose - Enable verbose logging\n   558→ * @param {Object} options.navigationManager - NavigationManager instance (optional)\n   559→ * @param {Object} options.networkTracker - NetworkTracker instance (optional)\n   560→ * @param {string|Object} options.selector - CSS selector, ElementHandle, or Playwright Locator\n   561→ * @param {boolean} options.scrollIntoView - Scroll into view (default: true)\n   562→ * @param {number} options.waitAfterScroll - Wait time after scroll in ms (default: TIMING.DEFAULT_WAIT_AFTER_SCROLL)\n   563→ * @param {boolean} options.smoothScroll - Use smooth scroll animation (default: true)\n   564→ * @param {number} options.waitAfterClick - Wait time after click in ms (default: 1000). Gives modals time to capture scroll position before opening\n   565→ * @param {boolean} options.waitForNavigation - Wait for navigation to complete if click causes navigation (default: true)\n   566→ * @param {number} options.navigationCheckDelay - Time to check if navigation started (default: 500ms)\n   567→ * @param {number} options.timeout - Timeout in ms (default: TIMING.DEFAULT_TIMEOUT)\n   568→ * @param {boolean} options.verify - Whether to verify the click operation (default: true)\n   569→ * @param {Function} options.verifyFn - Custom verification function (optional)\n   570→ * @returns {Promise<{clicked: boolean, navigated: boolean, verified: boolean, reason?: string}>}\n   571→ *   - clicked: true if click was performed\n   572→ *   - navigated: true if click caused navigation\n   573→ *   - verified: true if click was verified (navigation counts as verification)\n   574→ * @throws {Error} - If selector is missing, element not found, or click operation fails (except navigation/stop errors)\n   575→ */\n   576→export async function clickButton(options = {}) {\n   577→  const {\n   578→    page,\n   579→    engine,\n   580→    wait,\n   581→    log,\n   582→    verbose = false,\n   583→    navigationManager,\n   584→    networkTracker,\n   585→    selector,\n   586→    scrollIntoView: shouldScroll = true,\n   587→    waitAfterScroll = TIMING.DEFAULT_WAIT_AFTER_SCROLL,\n   588→    smoothScroll = true,\n   589→    waitAfterClick = 1000,\n   590→    waitForNavigation = true,\n   591→    navigationCheckDelay = 500,\n   592→    timeout = TIMING.DEFAULT_TIMEOUT,\n   593→    verify = true,\n   594→    verifyFn,\n   595→  } = options;\n   596→\n   597→  if (!selector) {\n   598→    throw new Error('clickButton: selector is required in options');\n   599→  }\n   600→\n   601→  // Record URL before click for navigation detection\n   602→  const startUrl = page.url();\n   603→\n   604→  try {\n   605→    // Step 1: Prepare element (find, validate, scroll into view)\n   606→    const prepareResult = await prepareElement({\n   607→      page,\n   608→      engine,\n   609→      wait,\n   610→      log,\n   611→      verbose,\n   612→      selector,\n   613→      scrollIntoView: shouldScroll,\n   614→      waitAfterScroll,\n   615→      smoothScroll,\n   616→      timeout,\n   617→    });\n   618→\n   619→    if (prepareResult.navigated) {\n   620→      return {\n   621→        clicked: false,\n   622→        navigated: true,\n   623→        verified: true,\n   624→        reason: 'navigation during scroll',\n   625→      };\n   626→    }\n   627→\n   628→    const { locatorOrElement } = prepareResult;\n   629→\n   630→    // Step 2: Execute click operation\n   631→    const clickResult = await executeClick({\n   632→      page,\n   633→      engine,\n   634→      log,\n   635→      locatorOrElement,\n   636→      noAutoScroll: !shouldScroll,\n   637→      verify,\n   638→      verifyFn,\n   639→    });\n   640→\n   641→    if (clickResult.navigated) {\n   642→      return {\n   643→        clicked: false,\n   644→        navigated: true,\n   645→        verified: true,\n   646→ waitForNavigation,\n   659→      navigationCheckDelay,\n   660→      waitAfterClick,\n   661→    });\n   662→\n   663→    return {\n   664→      clicked: true,\n   665→      navigated: gracefully'\n   673→      );\n   674→      // Navigation/stop during click is considered successful\n   675→      return {\n   676→        clicked: false,\n   677→        navigated: true,\n   678→       "content": "import { TIMING } from '../core/constants.js';\nimport { isNavigationError } from '../core/navigation-safety.js';\nimport { isActionStoppedError } from '../core/page-trigger-manager.js';\nimport { waitForLocatorOrElement } from '../elements/locators.js';\nimport { scrollIntoViewIfNeeded } from './scroll.js';\nimport { logElementInfo } from '../elements/content.js';\nimport { createEngineAdapter } from '../core/engine-adapter.js';\n\n/**\n * Default verification function for click operations.\n * Verifies that the click had an effect by checking for common patterns:\n * - Element state changes (disabled, aria-pressed, etc.)\n * - Element class changes\n * - Element visibility changes\n *\n * Note: Navigation-triggering clicks are considered \"verified\" if navigation starts.\n *\n * @param {Object} options - Verification options\n * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n * @param {string} options.engine - Engine type ('playwright' or 'puppeteer')\n * @param {Object} options.locatorOrElement - Element that was clicked\n * @param {Object} options.preClickState - State captured before click (optional)\n * @returns {Promise<{verified: boolean, reason: string}>}\n */\nexport async function defaultClickVerification(options = {}) {\n  const {\n    page,\n    engine,\n    locatorOrElement,\n    preClickState = {},\n    adapter: providedAdapter,\n  } = options;\n\n  try {\n    const adapter = providedAdapter || createEngineAdapter(page, engine);\n\n    // Get current element state\n    const getElementState = async () =>\n      await adapter.evaluateOnElement(locatorOrElement, (el) => ({\n        disabled: el.disabled,\n        ariaPressed: el.getAttribute('aria-pressed'),\n        ariaExpanded: el.getAttribute('aria-expanded'),\n        ariaSelected: el.getAttribute('aria-selected'),\n        checked: el.checked,\n        className: el.className,\n        isConnected: el.isConnected,\n      }));\n\n    const postClickState = await getElementState();\n\n    // If we have pre-click state, check for changes\n    if (preClickState && Object.keys(preClickState).length > 0) {\n      // Check for state changes that indicate click was processed\n      if (preClickState.ariaPressed !== postClickState.ariaPressed) {\n        return { verified: true, reason: 'aria-pressed changed' };\n      }\n      if (preClickState.ariaExpanded !== postClickState.ariaExpanded) {\n        return { verified: true, reason: 'aria-expanded changed' };\n      }\n      if (preClickState.ariaSelected !== postClickState.ariaSelected) {\n        return { verified: true, reason: 'aria-selected changed' };\n      }\n      if (preClickState.checked !== postClickState.checked) {\n        return { verified: true, reason: 'checked state changed' };\n      }\n      if (preClickState.className !== postClickState.className) {\n        return { verified: true, reason: 'className changed' };\n      }\n    }\n\n    // If element is still connected and not disabled, assume click worked\n    // (many clicks don't change element state - they trigger actions)\n    if (postClickState.isConnected) {\n      return {\n        verified: true,\n        reason: 'element still connected (assumed success)',\n      };\n    }\n\n    // Element was removed from DOM - likely click triggered UI change\n    return { verified: true, reason: 'element removed from DOM (UI updated)' };\n  } catch (error) {\n    if (isNavigationError(error) || isActionStoppedError(error)) {\n      // Navigation/stop during verification - click likely triggered navigation\n      return {\n        verified: true,\n        reason: 'navigation detected (expected for navigation clicks)',\n        navigationError: true,\n      };\n    }\n    throw error;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Capture element state before click for verification\n * @param {Object} options - Options\n * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n * @param {string} options.engine - Engine type\n * @param {Object} options.locatorOrElement - Element to capture state from\n * @param {Object} options.adapter - Engine adapter (optional, will be created if not provided)\n * @returns {Promise<Object>} - Pre-click state object\n */\nexport async function capturePreClickState(options = {}) {\n  const { page, engine, locatorOrElement, adapter: providedAdapter } = options;\n\n  try {\n    const adapter = providedAdapter || createEngineAdapter(page, engine);\n    return await adapter.evaluateOnElement(locatorOrElement, (el) => ({\n      disabled: el.disabled,\n      ariaPressed: el.getAttribute('aria-pressed'),\n      ariaExpanded: el.getAttribute('aria-expanded'),\n      ariaSelected: el.getAttribute('aria-selected'),\n      checked: el.checked,\n      className: el.className,\n      isConnected: el.isConnected,\n    }));\n  } catch (error) {\n    if (isNavigationError(error) || isActionStoppedError(error)) {\n      return {};\n    }\n    throw error;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Verify click operation\n * @param {Object} options - Verification options\n * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n * @param {string} options.engine - Engine type\n * @param {Object} options.locatorOrElement - Element that was clicked\n * @param {Object} options.preClickState - State captured before click\n * @param {Function} options.verifyFn - Custom verification function (optional)\n * @param {Function} options.log - Logger instance\n * @returns {Promise<{verified: boolean, reason: string}>}\n */\nexport async function verifyClick(options = {}) {\n  const {\n    page,\n    engine,\n    locatorOrElement,\n    preClickState = {},\n    verifyFn = defaultClickVerification,\n    log = { debug: () => {} },\n  } = options;\n\n  const result = await verifyFn({\n    page,\n    engine,\n    locatorOrElement,\n    preClickState,\n  });\n\n  if (result.verified) {\n    log.debug(() => `✅ Click verification passed: ${result.reason}`);\n  } else {\n    log.debug(\n      () => `⚠️  Click verification uncertain: ${result.reason || 'unknown'}`\n    );\n  }\n\n  return result;\n}\n\n/**\n * Click an element (low-level)\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object (required for verification)\n * @param {string} options.engine - Engine type ('playwright' or 'puppeteer')\n * @param {Function} options.log - Logger instance\n * @param {Object} options.locatorOrElement - Element or locator to click\n * @param {boolean} options.noAutoScroll - Prevent Playwright's automatic scrolling (default: false)\n * @param {boolean} options.verify - Whether to verify the click operation (default: true)\n * @param {Function} options.verifyFn - Custom verification function (optional)\n * @param {Object} options.adapter - Engine adapter (optional, will be created if not provided)\n * @returns {Promise<{clicked: boolean, verified: boolean, reason?: string}>}\n */\nexport async function clickElement(options = {}) {\n  const {\n    page,\n    engine,\n    log,\n    locatorOrElement,\n    noAutoScroll = false,\n    verify = true,\n    verifyFn,\n    adapter: providedAdapter,\n  } = options;\n\n  if (!locatorOrElement) {\n    throw new Error('locatorOrElement is required in options');\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const adapter = providedAdapter || createEngineAdapter(page, engine);\n\n    // Capture pre-click state for verification\n    let preClickState = {};\n    if (verify && page) {\n      preClickState = await capturePreClickState({\n        page,\n        engine,\n        locatorOrElement,\n        adapter,\n      });\n    }\n\n    // Click with appropriate options\n    const clickOptions =\n      engine === 'playwright' && noAutoScroll ? { force: true } : {};\n    if (engine === 'playwright' && noAutoScroll) {\n      log.debug(() => `🔍 [VERBOSE] Clicking with noAutoScroll (force: true)`);\n    }\n    await adapter.click(locatorOrElement, clickOptions);\n\n    // Verify click if requested\n    if (verify && page) {\n      const verificationResult = await verifyClick({\n        page,\n        engine,\n        locatorOrElement,\n        preClickState,\n        verifyFn,\n        log,\n      });\n\n      return {\n        clicked: true,\n        verified: verificationResult.verified,\n        reason: verificationResult.reason,\n      };\n    }\n\n    return { clicked: true, verified: true };\n  } catch (error) {\n    if (isNavigationError(error) || isActionStoppedError(error)) {\n      console.log(\n        '⚠️  Navigation/stop detected during click, recovering gracefully'\n      );\n      // Navigation during click is considered verified (click triggered navigation)\n      return {\n        clicked: false,\n        verified: true,\n        reason: 'navigation during click',\n      };\n    }\n    throw error;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Detect if a click caused navigation by checking URL change or navigation state\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n * @param {Object} options.navigationManager - NavigationManager instance (optional)\n * @param {string} options.startUrl - URL before click\n * @param {Function} options.log - Logger instance\n * @returns {Promise<{navigated: boolean, newUrl: string}>}\n */\nasync function detectNavigation(options = {}) {\n  const { page, navigationManager, startUrl, log } = options;\n\n  const currentUrl = page.url();\n  const urlChanged = currentUrl !== startUrl;\n\n  if (navigationManager && navigationManager.isNavigating()) {\n    log.debug(() => '🔄 Navigation detected via NavigationManager');\n    return { navigated: true, newUrl: currentUrl };\n  }\n\n  if (urlChanged) {\n    log.debug(() => `🔄 URL changed: ${startUrl} → ${currentUrl}`);\n    return { navigated: true, newUrl: currentUrl };\n  }\n\n  return { navigated: false, newUrl: currentUrl };\n}\n\n/**\n * Prepare element for clicking - find, validate, and optionally scroll into view\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n * @param {string} options.engine - Engine type\n * @param {Function} options.wait - Wait function\n * @param {Function} options.log - Logger instance\n * @param {boolean} options.verbose - Enable verbose logging\n * @param {string|Object} options.selector - CSS selector, ElementHandle, or Playwright Locator\n * @param {boolean} options.scrollIntoView - Scroll into view (default: true)\n * @param {number} options.waitAfterScroll - Wait time after scroll in ms\n * @param {boolean} options.smoothScroll - Use smooth scroll animation\n * @param {number} options.timeout - Timeout in ms\n * @returns {Promise<{locatorOrElement: Object, scrolled: boolean, navigated: boolean}>}\n */\nasync function prepareElement(options = {}) {\n  const {\n    page,\n    engine,\n    wait,\n    log,\n    verbose = false,\n    selector,\n    scrollIntoView: shouldScroll = true,\n    waitAfterScroll,\n    smoothScroll = true,\n    timeout,\n  } = options;\n\n  // Get locator/element and wait for it to be visible (unified for both engines)\n  const locatorOrElement = await waitForLocatorOrElement({\n    page,\n    engine,\n    selector,\n    timeout,\n  });\n\n  // Log element info if verbose\n  if (verbose) {\n    await logElementInfo({ page, engine, log, locatorOrElement });\n  }\n\n  // Scroll into view (if requested and needed)\n  if (shouldScroll) {\n    const behavior = smoothScroll ? 'smooth' : 'instant';\n    const scrollResult = await scrollIntoViewIfNeeded({\n      page,\n      engine,\n      wait,\n      log,\n      locatorOrElement,\n      behavior,\n      waitAfterScroll,\n      verify: false, // Don't verify scroll here, we verify the overall click\n    });\n    // Check if scroll was aborted due to navigation/stop\n    if (!scrollResult.skipped && !scrollResult.scrolled) {\n      return { locatorOrElement: null, scrolled: false, navigated: true };\n    }\n    return { locatorOrElement, scrolled: true, navigated: false };\n  } else {\n    log.debug(() => `🔍 [VERBOSE] Skipping scroll (scrollIntoView: false)`);\n    return { locatorOrElement, scrolled: false, navigated: false };\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Execute the click operation with {boolean} options.verify - Whether to verify the click operation\n * @param {Function} options.verifyFn - Custom verification function (optional)\n * @returns {Promise<{clicked: boolean, verified: boolean, reason?: string, navigated: boolean}>}\n */\nasync function executeClick(options = {}) {\n  const {\n    page,\n    engine,\n    log,\n    locatorOrElement,\n    noAutoScroll = false,\n locatorOrElement,\n    noAutoScroll,\n    verify,\n    verifyFn,\n  });\n\n  if (!clickResult.clicked) {\n    // Navigation/stop occurred during click itself\n    return {\n      clicked: false,\n      verified: true,\n      navigated: true,\n      reason: 'navigation during click',\n    };\n  }\n\n  log.debug(() => `🔍 [VERBOSE] Click completed`);\n\n  return {\n    clicked: true,\n    verified: clickResult.verified,\n    navigated: false,\n    reason: clickResult.reason,\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Handle navigation detection and waiting after a click\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration const {\n    page,\n    wait,\n    log,\n    navigationManager,\n    networkTracker,\n    startUrl,\n    waitForNavigation = true,\n    navigationCheckDelay = 500,\n    waitAfterClick = 1000,\n  } = options;\n\n  // Check if click caused navigation\n  if (waitForNavigation) {\n    // Wait briefly for navigation to potentially start\n    await wait({\n      ms: navigationCheckDelay,\n      reason: 'checking for navigation after click',\n    });\n\n    // Detect if navigation occurred\n    const { navigated, newUrl } = await detectNavigation({\n      page,\n      navigationManager,\n      startUrl,\n      log,\n    });\n\n    if (navigated) {\n      log.debug(() => `🔄 Click triggered navigation to: ${newUrl}`);\n\n      // Wait for page to be fully ready (network idle + no more redirects)\n      // Note: If navigationManager detected external navigation, it's already waiting\n      // We still call waitForPageReady here to ensure we don't return until page is ready\n      if (navigationManager) {\n        // Use longer timeout (120s) for full page loads after click-triggered navigation\n        await navigationManager.waitForPageReady({\n          timeout: 120000,\n          reason: 'after click navigation',\n        });\n      } else if (networkTracker) {\n        // Without navigation manager, use network tracker directly with 30s idle time\n        await networkTracker.waitForNetworkIdle({\n          timeout: 120000,\n          // idleTime defaults to 30000ms from tracker config\n        });\n      } else {\n        // Fallback: wait a bit for page to settle\n        await wait({ ms: 2000, reason: 'page settle after navigation' });\n      }\n\n      // Navigation is considered successful verification\n      return {\n        navigated: true,\n        verified: true,\n        reason: 'click triggered navigation',\n      };\n    }\n  }\n\n  // No navigation - wait after click if specified (useful for modals)\n  if (waitAfterClick > 0) {\n    const waitResult = await wait({\n      ms: waitAfterClick,\n      reason: 'post-click settling time for modal scroll capture',\n    });\n\n    // Check if wait was aborted due to navigation that happened during the wait\n    if (waitResult && waitResult.aborted) {\n      log.debug(\n        () => '🔄 Navigation detected during post-click wait (wait was aborted)'\n      );\n\n      // Re-check for navigation since it happened during the wait\n      const { navigated: lateNavigated, newUrl: lateUrl } =\n        await detectNavigation({\n          page,\n          navigationManager,\n          startUrl,\n          log,\n        });\n\n      if (lateNavigated) {\n        log.debug(() => `🔄 Confirmed late navigation to: ${lateUrl}`);\n\n        // Wait for page to be fully ready\n        if (navigationManager) {\n          await navigationManager.waitForPageReady({\n            timeout: 120000,\n            reason: 'after late-detected click navigation',\n          });\n        }\n\n        return {\n          navigated: true,\n          verified: true,\n          reason: 'late-detected navigation',\n        };\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Final check: did navigation happen while we were processing?\n  // This catches cases where navigation started but wasn't detected earlier\n  if (navigationManager && navigationManager.shouldAbort()) {\n    log.debug(\n      () => '🔄 Navigation detected via abort signal at end of click processing'\n    );\n\n    await navigationManager.waitForPageReady({\n      timeout: 120000,\n      reason: 'after abort-detected click navigation',\n    });\n\n    return {\n      navigated: true,\n      verified: true,\n      reason: 'abort-signal navigation',\n    };\n  }\n\n  // If we have network tracking, wait for any XHR/fetch to complete\n  // Use shorter idle time for non-navigation clicks (just waiting for XHR, not full page load)\n  if (networkTracker) {\n    await networkTracker.waitForNetworkIdle({\n      timeout: 10000, // Maximum wait time\n      idleTime: 2000, // Only 2 seconds of idle needed for XHR completion\n    });\n  }\n\n  return { navigated: false, verified: true, reason: 'no navigation detected' };\n}\n\n/**\n * (navigation counts as verification)\n * @throws {Error} - If selector is missing, element not found, or click operation fails (except navigation/stop errors)\n */\nexport async function clickButton(options = {}) {\n  const {\n    page,\n    engine,\n    wait,\n    log,\n    verbose = false,\n    navigationManager,\n    networkTracker,\n    selector,\n    scrollIntoView: shouldScroll = true,\n    waitAfterScroll = TIMING.DEFAULT_WAIT_AFTER_SCROLL,\n    smoothScroll = true,\n    waitAfterClick = 1000,\n    waitForNavigation = true,\n    navigationCheckDelay = 500,\n    timeout = Verification options\n    13→ * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n    14→ * @param {string} options.engine - Engine type ('playwright' or 'puppeteer')\n    15→ * @param {Object} options.locatorOrElement - Element that was filled\n    16→ * @param {string} options.expectedText - Text that should be in the element\n    17→ * @returns {Promise<{verified: boolean, actualValue: string}>}\n    18→ */\n    19→export async function defaultFillVerification(options = {}) {\n    20→  const { page, engine, locatorOrElement, expectedText } = options;\n    21→\n    22→  try {\n    23→    const actualValue = await getInputValue({ page, engine, locatorOrElement });\n    24→    // Verify that the value contains the expected text (handles cases where value may have formatting)\n    25→    const verified =\n    26→      actualValue === expectedText || actualValue.includes(expectedText);\n    27→    return { verified, actualValue };\n    28→  } catch (error) {\n    29→    if (isNavigationError(error)) {\n    30→      return { verified: false, actualValue: '', navigationError: true };\n    31→    }\n    32→    throw error;\n    33→  }\n    34→}\n    35→\n    36→/**\n    37→ * Verify fill operation with retry logic\n    38→ * @param {Object} options - Expected: \"${expectedText}\", Got: \"${lastResult.actualValue}\"`\n    93→  );\n    94→  return { ...lastResult, attempts };\n    95→}\n    96→\n    97→/**\n    98→ * Check if an input element is empty\n    99→ * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n   100→ * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n   101→ * @param {string} options.engine - Engine type ('playwright' or 'puppeteer')\n   102→ * @param {Object} options.locatorOrElement - Element or locator to check\n   103→ * @param {Object} options.adapter - Engine adapter (optional, will be created if not provided)\n   104→ * @returns {Promise<boolean>} - True if empty, false if has content (returns true on navigation)\n   105→ */\n   106→export async function checkIfElementEmpty(options = {}) {\n   107→  const { page, engine, locatorOrElement, adapter: providedAdapter } = options;\n   108→\n   109→  if (!locatorOrElement) {\n   110→    throw new Error('locatorOrElement is required in options');\n   111→  }\n   112→\n   113→  // Add defensive check for page parameter\n   114→  if (!page && !providedAdapter) {\n   115→    const availableKeys = Object.keys(options).join(', ');\n   116→    throw new Error(\n   117→      `checkIfElementEmpty: page is required in options when adapter is not provided. Available option keys: [${availableKeys}]. This indicates the 'page' parameter was not passed correctly from the calling function.`\n   118→    );\n   119→  }\n   120→\n   121→  try {\n   122→    const adapter = providedAdapter || createEngineAdapter(page, engine);\n   123→    const currentValue = await adapter.getInputValue(locatorOrElement);\n   124→    return !currentValue || currentValue.trim() === '';\n   125→  } catch (error) {\n   126→    if (isNavigationError(error)) {\n   127→      console.log(\n   128→        '⚠️  Navigation detected during checkIfElementEmpty, returning true'\n   129→      );\n   130→      return true;\n   131→    }\n   132→    throw error;\n   133→  }\n   134→}\n   135→\n   136→/**\n   137→ * Perform fill/type operation on an element (low-level)\n   138→ * @param {Object} options - If selector or text is missing, or if operation fails (except navigation)\n   248→ */\n   249→export async function fillTextArea(options = {}) {\n   250→  const {\n   251→    page,\n   252→    engine,\n   253→    wait,\n   254→    log,\n   255→    selector,\n   256→    text,\n   257→    checkEmpty = true,\n   258→    scrollIntoView: shouldScroll = true,\n   259→    simulateTyping = true,\n   260→    timeout = TIMING.DEFAULT_TIMEOUT,\n   261→    verify = true,\n   262→    verifyFn,\n   263→    verificationTimeout = TIMING.VERIFICATION_TIMEOUT,\n   264→  } = options;\n   265→\n   266→  // Defensive check: Validate that page parameter is present\n   267→  if (!page) {\n   268→    const availableKeys = Object.keys(options).join(', ');\n   269→    throw new Error(\n   270→      `fillTextArea: page is required in options.      });\n   294→      if (!isEmpty) {\n   295→        const currentValue = await getInputValue({\n   296→          page,\n   297→          engine,\n   298→          locatorOrElement,\n   299→        });\n   300→        log.debug(\n   301→          () =>\n   302→            `🔍 [VERBOSE] Textarea already has content, skipping: \"${currentValue.substring(0, 30)}...\"`\n   303→        );\n   304→        return {\n   305→          filled: false,\n   306→          verified: false,\n   307→          skipped: true,\n   308→          actualValue: currentValue,\n   309→        };\n   310→      }\n   311→    }\n   312→\n   313→    // Scroll into view (if requested and needed)\n   314→    if (shouldScroll) {\n   315→      await scrollIntoViewIfNeeded({\n   316→        page,\n   317→        engine,\n   318→        wait,\n   319→        log,\n   320→        locatorOrElement,\n   321→        behavior: 'smooth',\n   322→      });\n   323→    }\n   324→\n   325→    // Click the element [2026-01-13T18:05:41.863Z] [INFO] \n  // Check if element is at least partially visible with some margin\n  const isInVerticalView =\n    rect.top < viewportHeight - margin && rect.bottom > margin;\n  const isInHorizontalView =\n    rect.left < viewportWidth - margin && rect.right > margin;\n\n  return isInVerticalView && isInHorizontalView;\n};\n\n/**\n * Default verification function for scroll operations.\n * Verifies that the element is now visible in the viewport.\n * @param {Object} options - Element that was scrolled to\n * @param {number} options.margin - Margin in pixels to consider element visible (default: 50)\n * @returns {Promise<{verified: boolean, inViewport: boolean}>}\n */\nexport async function defaultScrollVerification(options = {}) {\n  const { page, engine, locatorOrElement, margin = 50 } = options;\n\n  try {\n    let inViewport;\n    if (engine === 'playwright') {\n      inViewport = await locatorOrElement.evaluate(\n        isElementInViewportFn,\n        margin\n      );\n    } else {\n      inViewport = await page.evaluate(\n        isElementInViewportFn,\n        locatorOrElement,\n        margin\n      );\n    }\n    return { verified: inViewport, inViewport };\n  } catch (error) {\n    if (isNavigationError(error) || isActionStoppedError(error)) {\n      return { verified: false, inViewport: false, navigationError: true };\n    }\n    throw error;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Verify scroll operation with retry logic\n * @param {Object} options - startTime < timeout) {\n    attempts++;\n    lastResult = await verifyFn({\n      page,\n      engine,\n      locatorOrElement,\n    });\n\n    if (lastResult.verified) {\n      log.debug(\n        () => `✅ Scroll verification succeeded after ${attempts} attempt(s)`\n      );\n      return { ...lastResult, attempts };\n    }\n\n    if (lastResult.navigationError) {\n      log.debug(\n        () => '⚠️  Navigation/stop detected during scroll verification'\n      );\n      return { ...lastResult, attempts };\n    }\n\n    // Wait before next retry\n    await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, retryInterval));\n  }\n\n  log.debug(\n    () =>\n      `❌ Scroll verification failed after ${attempts} attempts - element not in viewport`\n  );\n  return { ...lastResult, attempts };\n}\n\n/**\n * Scroll element into view (low-level, does not check if scroll is needed)\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n * @param {Object} options.page - 'smooth' or 'instant' (default: 'smooth')\n * @param {boolean} options.verify - Whether to verify the scroll operation (default: true)\n * @param {Function} options.verifyFn - Custom verification function (optional)\n * @param {number} options.verificationTimeout - Percentage of viewport height to consider \"significant\" (default: 10)\n * @param {number} options.waitAfterScroll - Wait time after scroll in ms (default: TIMING.SCROLL_ANIMATION_WAIT for smooth, 0 for instant)\n * @param {boolean} options.verify - TIMING.SCROLL_ANIMATION_WAIT : 0,\n    verify = true,\n    verifyFn,\n    verificationTimeout = TIMING.VERIFICATION_TIMEOUT,\n  } = options;\n\n  if (!locatorOrElement) {\n    throw new Error('locatorOrElement is required in options');\n  }\n\n  // Check if scrolling is needed\n  const needsScroll = await needsScrolling({\n    page,\n    engine,\n    locatorOrElement,\n    threshold,\n  });\n\n  if (!needsScroll) {\n    log.debug(\n      () =>\n        `🔍 [VERBOSE] Element already in view (within ${threshold}% threshold), skipping scroll`\n    );\n    return { scrolled: false, verified: true, skipped: true };\n  }\n\n  // Perform scroll with verification\n  log.debug(() => `🔍 [VERBOSE] Scrolling with behavior: ${behavior}`);\n  const scrollResult = await scrollIntoView({\n    page,\n    engine,\n    locatorOrElement,\n    behavior,\n    verify,\n    verifyFn,\n    verificationTimeout,\n    log,\n  });\n\n  if (!scrollResult.scrolled) {\n    // Navigation/stop occurred during scroll\n    return { scrolled: false, verified: false, skipped: false };\n  }\n\n  // Wait for scroll animation if specified\n  if (waitAfterScroll > 0) {\n    await wait({\n      ms: waitAfterScroll,\n      reason: `${behavior} scroll animation to complete`,\n    });\n  }\n\n  if (scrollResult.verified) {\n    log.debug(() => '✅ Scroll verification passed - element is in viewport');\n  } else {\n    log.debug(\n      () =>\n        '⚠️  Scroll verification failed - element may not be fully in viewport'\n    );\n  }\n\n  return {\n    scrolled: true,\n    verified: scrollResult.verified,\n    skipped: false,\n  };\n}\n","numLines":342,"startLine":1,"totalLines":342}}}

*/\n    46→export async function querySelectorAll(options = {}) {\n    47→  const { page, engine, selector } = options;\n    48→\n    49→  if (!selector) {\n    50→    throw new Error('selector is @param {boolean} options.exact - Exact match vs contains (default: false)\n    83→ * @returns {Promise<string>} - CSS selector that can be used with other commander methods\n    84→ */\n    85→export async function findByText(options = {}) {\n    86→  const { engine, text, selector = '*', exact = false } = options;\n    87→\n    88→  if (!text) {\n    89→    throw new Error('text is required in   };\n   105→  }\n   106→}\n   107→\n   108→/**\n   109→ * Check if a selector is a Playwright-specific text selector\n   110→ * @param {string} selector - The selector to check\n   111→ * @returns CSS selector or element\n * @returns {Promise<boolean>} - True if visible\n */\nexport async function isVisible(options = {}) {\n  const { page, engine, selector } = options;\n\n  if (!selector) {\n    throw new Error('selector is required in options');\n  }\n\n  try {\n    if (engine === 'playwright') {\n      const locator = await getLocatorOrElement({ page, engine, selector });\n      try {\n        await locator.waitFor({\n          state: 'visible',\n          timeout: TIMING.VISIBILITY_CHECK_TIMEOUT,\n        });\n        return true;\n      } catch {\n        return false;\n      }\n    } else {\n      const element = await getLocatorOrElement({ page, engine, selector });\n      if (!element) {\n        return false;\n      }\n      return await page.evaluate(\n        (el) => el.offsetWidth > 0 && el.offsetHeight > 0,\n        element\n      );\n    }\n  } catch (error) {\n    if (isNavigationError(error)) {\n      console.log(\n        '⚠️  Navigation detected during visibility check, returning false'\n      );\n      return false;\n    }\n    throw error;\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if element is enabled (not disabled, not loading)\n * @param {Object} options -       "content": "import { isNavigationError } from '../core/navigation-safety.js';\nimport { createEngineAdapter } from '../core/engine-adapter.js';\n\n/**\n * Wait/sleep for a specified time with optional verbose logging\n * Now supports abort signals to interrupt the wait when navigation occurs\n *\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n * @param {Function} options.log - Logger instance\n * @param {number} options.ms - Milliseconds to wait\n * @param {string} options.reason - Reason for waiting (for verbose logging)\n * @param {AbortSignal} options.abortSignal - Optional abort signal to interrupt wait\n * @returns {Promise<{completed: boolean, aborted: boolean}>}\n */\nexport async function wait(options = {}) {\n  const { log, ms, reason, abortSignal } = options;\n\n  if (!ms) {\n    throw new Error('ms is required in options');\n  }\n\n  if (reason) {\n    log.debug(() => `🔍 [VERBOSE] Waiting ${ms}ms: ${reason}`);\n  }\n\n  // If abort signal provided, use abortable wait\n  if (abortSignal) {\n    // Check if already aborted\n    if (abortSignal.aborted) {\n      log.debug(\n        () => `🛑 Wait skipped (already aborted): ${reason || 'no reason'}`\n      );\n      return { completed: false, aborted: true };\n    }\n\n    return new Promise((resolve) => {\n      let timeoutId = null;\n      let abortHandler = null;\n\n      const cleanup = () => {\n        if (timeoutId) {\n          clearTimeout(timeoutId);\n        }\n        if (abortHandler) {\n          abortSignal.removeEventListener('abort', abortHandler);\n        }\n      };\n\n      abortHandler = () => {\n        cleanup();\n        log.debug(() => `🛑 Wait aborted: ${reason || 'no reason'}`);\n        resolve({ completed: false, aborted: true });\n      };\n\n      abortSignal.addEventListener('abort', abortHandler);\n\n      timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {\n        cleanup();\n        if (reason) {\n          log.debug(() => `🔍 [VERBOSE] Wait complete (${ms}ms)`);\n        }\n        resolve({ completed: true, aborted: false });\n      }, ms);\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Standard non-abortable wait (backwards compatible)\n  await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, ms));\n\n  if (reason) {\n    log.debug(() => `🔍 [VERBOSE] Wait complete (${ms}ms)`);\n  }\n\n  return { completed: true, aborted: false };\n}\n\n/**\n * Evaluate JavaScript in page context\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n * @param {string} options.engine - Engine type ('playwright' or 'puppeteer')\n * @param {Function} options.fn - Function to evaluate\n * @param {Array} options.args - Arguments to pass to function (default: [])\n * @param {Object} options.adapter - Engine adapter (optional, will be created if not provided)\n * @returns {Promise<any>} - Result of evaluation\n */\nexport async function evaluate(options = {}) {\n  const { page, engine, fn, args = [], adapter: providedAdapter } = options;\n\n  if (!fn) {\n    throw new Error('fn is required in options');\n  }\n\n  const adapter = providedAdapter || createEngineAdapter(page, engine);\n  return await adapter.evaluateOnPage(fn, args);\n}\n\n/**\n * Safe evaluate that catches navigation errors and returns default value\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n * @param {Object} options.page - Browser page object\n * @param {string} options.engine - Engine type ('playwright' or 'puppeteer')\n * @param {Function} options.fn - Function to evaluate\n * @param {Array} options.args - Arguments to pass to function (default: [])\n * @param {any} options.defaultValue - Value to return on navigation error (default: null)\n * @param {string} options.operationName - Name for logging (default: 'evaluate')\n * @param {boolean} options.silent - Don't log warnings (default: false)\n * @returns {Promise<{success: boolean, value: any, navigationError: boolean}>}\n */\nexport async function safeEvaluate(options = {}) {\n  const {\n    page,\n    engine,\n    fn,\n    args = [],\n    defaultValue = null,\n    operationName = 'evaluate',\n    silent = false,\n  } = options;\n\n  try {\n    const value = await evaluate({ page, engine, fn, args });\n    return { success: true, value, navigationError: false };\n  } catch (error) {\n    if (isNavigationError(error)) {\n      if (!silent) {\n        console.log(\n          `⚠️  Navigation detected during ${operationName}, recovering gracefully`\n        );\n      }\n      return { success: false, value: defaultValue, navigationError: true };\n    }\n    throw error;\n  }\n}\n",

Configuration options\n   167→ * @param {Function} options.count - Count function\n   168→ * @param {Function} options.findByText - FindByText function\n   169→ * @param {Array<string>} options.dataQaSelectors - Selector or null\n   173→ */\n   174→export async function findToggleButton(options = {}) {\n   175→  const {\n   176→    count,\n   177→    findByText,\n   178→    dataQaSelectors = [],\n   179→    textToFind,\n   180→    elementTypes = ['button', 'a', 'span'],\n   181→  } = options;\n   182→\n   183→  // Try data-qa selectors first\n   184→  for (const sel of dataQaSelectors) {\n   185→    const elemCount = await count({ selector: sel });\n   186→    if (elemCount > 0) {\n   187→      return sel;\n   188→    }\n   189→  }\n   190→\n   191→  // Fallback to text search\n   192→  if (textToFind) {\n   193→    for (const elementType of elementTypes) {\n   194→      const selector = await findByText({\n   195→        text: textToFind,\n   196→        selector: elementType,\n   197→      });\n   198→      const elemCount = await count({ selector });\n   199→      if (elemCount > 0) {\n   200→        return selector;\n   201→      }\n   202→    }\n   203→  }\n   204→\n   205→  return null;\n   206→}\n   207→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. Configuration options\n * @param {Function} options.getUrl - Function to get current URL\n * @param {Function} options.wait - Wait function\n * @param {Function} options.evaluate - Evaluate function\n * @param {string} options.targetUrl - Target URL to wait for\n * @param {string} options.description - Description for logging\n * @param {Function} options.customCheck - Optional custom check function (async)\n * @param {Function} options.pageClosedCallback - Callback to check if page closed\n * @param {number} options.pollingInterval - Polling interval in ms (default: 1000)\n * @returns {Promise<any>} - Result from customCheck or true if URL matched\n */\nexport async function waitForUrlCondition(options = {}) {\n  const {\n    getUrl,\n    wait,\n    evaluate,\n    targetUrl,\n    description,\n    customCheck,\n    pageClosedCallback = () => false,\n    pollingInterval = 1000,\n  } = options;\n\n  if (description) {\n    console.log(`⏳ ${description}...`);\n  }\n\n  while (true) {\n    if (pageClosedCallback()) {\n      return null;\n    }\n\n    try {\n      // Run custom check if provided\n      if (customCheck) {\n        const customResult = await customCheck(getUrl());\n        if (customResult !== undefined && customResult !== null) {\n          return customResult;\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Check if target URL reached\n      const currentUrl = getUrl();\n      if (currentUrl.startsWith(targetUrl)) {\n        return true;\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      if (pageClosedCallback()) {\n        return null;\n      }\n\n      // Handle navigation errors gracefully\n      if (isNavigationError(error)) {\n        console.log(\n          '⚠️  Navigation detected during URL check, continuing to wait...'\n        );\n      } else {\n        console.log(\n          `⚠️  Temporary error while checking URL: ${error.message.substring(0, 100)}... (retrying)`\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    await wait({\n      ms: pollingInterval,\n      reason: 'polling interval before next URL check',\n    });\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Install click detection listener on page\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n * @param {Function} options.evaluate - Evaluate function\n * @param {string} options.buttonText - Text to detect\n * @param {string} options.storageKey - SessionStorage key to set\n * @returns {Promise<boolean>} - True if installed, false on navigation\n */\nexport async function installClickListener(options = {}) {\n  const { evaluate, buttonText, storageKey } = options;\n\n  const safeEvaluate = withNavigationSafety(evaluate, {\n    onNavigationError: () => {\n      console.log(\n        '⚠️  Navigation detected during installClickListener, skipping'\n      );\n      return false;\n    },\n  });\n\n  const result = await safeEvaluate({\n    fn: (text, key) => {\n      document.addEventListener(\n        'click',\n        (event) => {\n          let element = event.target;\n          while (element && element !== document.body) {\n            const elementText = element.textContent?.trim() || '';\n            if (\n              elementText === text ||\n              ((element.tagName === 'A' || element.tagName === 'BUTTON') &&\n                elementText.includes(text))\n            ) {\n              console.log(`[Click Listener] Detected click on ${text} button!`);\n              window.sessionStorage.setItem(key, 'true');\n              break;\n            }\n            element = element.parentElement;\n          }\n        },\n        true\n      );\n    },\n    args: [buttonText, storageKey],\n  });\n\n  return result === false ? false : true;\n}\n\n/**\n * Check and clear session storage flag\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n * @param {Function} options.evaluate - Evaluate function\n * @param {string} options.storageKey - SessionStorage key\n * @returns {Promise<boolean>} - True if flag was set, false otherwise or on navigation\n */\nexport async function checkAndClearFlag(options = {}) {\n  const { evaluate, storageKey } = options;\n\n  const safeEvaluate = withNavigationSafety(evaluate, {\n    onNavigationError: () => {\n      console.log(\n        '⚠️  Navigation detected during checkAndClearFlag, returning false'\n      );\n      return false;\n    },\n  });\n\n  return await safeEvaluate({\n    fn: (key) => {\n      const flag = window.sessionStorage.getItem(key);\n      if (flag === 'true') {\n        window.sessionStorage.removeItem(key);\n        return true;\n      }\n      return false;\n    },\n    args: [storageKey],\n  });\n}\n\n/**\n * Find toggle button using multiple strategies\n * @param {Object} options - Configuration options\n * @param {Function} options.count - Count function\n * @param {Function} options.findByText - FindByText function\n * @param {Array<string>} options.dataQaSelectors - Data-qa selectors to try\n * @param {string} options.textToFind - Text to search for\n * @param {Array<string>} options.elementTypes - Element types to search\n * @returns {Promise<string|null>} - Selector or null\n */\nexport async function findToggleButton(options = {}) {\n  const {\n    count,\n    findByText,\n    dataQaSelectors = [],\n    textToFind,\n    elementTypes = ['button', 'a', 'span'],\n  } = options;\n\n  // Try data-qa selectors first\n  for (const sel of dataQaSelectors) {\n    const elemCount = await count({ selector: sel });\n    if (elemCount > 0) {\n      return sel;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fallback to text search\n  if (textToFind) {\n    for (const elementType of elementTypes) {\n      const selector = await findByText({\n        text: textToFind,\n        selector: elementType,\n      });\n      const elemCount = await count({ selector });\n      if (elemCount > 0) {\n        return selector;\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  return null;\n}\n",
      "numLines": 207,
      "startLine": 1,
      "totalLines": 207
    }
  }
}

uses: actions/checkout@v4\n        with:\n          fetch-depth: 0\n\n      - name: Check for changelog fragments\n        run: |\n          # Get list of fragment files (excluding README and template)\n          FRAGMENTS=$(find changelog.d -name \"*.md\" ! -name \"README.md\" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)\n\n          # Get changed files in PR\n          CHANGED_FILES=$(git diff --name-only origin/${{ github.base_ref }}...HEAD)\n\n          # Check if any source files changed (excluding docs and config)\n          SOURCE_CHANGED=$(echo \"$CHANGED_FILES\" | grep -E \"^rust/(src/|tests/|Cargo\\.toml)\" | wc -l)\n\n          if [ \"$SOURCE_CHANGED\" -gt 0 ] && [ \"$FRAGMENTS\" -eq 0 ]; then\n            echo \"::warning::No changelog fragment found. Please add a changelog entry in rust/changelog.d/\"\n            echo \"\"\n            echo \"To create a changelog fragment:\"\n            echo \"  Create a new .md file in rust/changelog.d/ with your changes\"\n            echo \"\"\n            echo \"See rust/changelog.d/README.md for more information.\"\n            # Note: This is a warning, not a failure, to allow flexibility\n            # Change 'exit 0' to 'exit 1' to make it required\n            exit 0\n          fi\n\n          echo \"Changelog check passed\"\n\n  # === LINT AND FORMAT CHECK ===\n  # Lint runs independently of changelog check - it's a fast check that should always run\n  lint:\n    name: Lint and Format Check\n    runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n    needs: [detect-changes]\n    if: |\n      github.event_name == 'push' ||\n      github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||\n      needs.detect-changes.outputs.rs-changed == 'true' ||\n      needs.detect-changes.outputs.toml-changed == 'true' ||\n      needs.detect-changes.outputs.mjs-changed == 'true' ||\n      needs.detect-changes.outputs.docs-changed == 'true' ||\n      needs.detect-changes.outputs.workflow-changed == 'true'\n    steps:\n      - uses: actions/checkout@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Rust\n        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable\n        with:\n          components: rustfmt, clippy\n\n      - name: Setup Node.js\n        uses: actions/setup-node@v4\n        with:\n          node-version: '20.x'\n\n      - name: Cache cargo registry\n        uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cargo/registry\n            ~/.cargo/git\n            rust/target\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('rust/Cargo.lock') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-\n\n      - name: Check formatting\n        run: cargo fmt --all -- --check\n\n      - name: Run Clippy\n        run: cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features\n\n      - name: Check file size limit\n        working-directory: .\n        run: node rust/scripts/check-file-size.mjs\n\n  # === TEST ===\n  # Test runs independently of changelog check\n  test:\n    name: Test (${{ matrix.os }})\n    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}\n    needs: [detect-changes, changelog]\n    # Run if: push event, OR changelog succeeded, OR changelog was skipped (docs-only PR)\n    if: always() && (github.event_name == 'push' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' || needs.changelog.result == 'success' || needs.changelog.result == 'skipped')\n    strategy:\n      fail-fast: false\n      matrix:\n        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]\n    steps:\n      - uses: actions/checkout@v4\n\n      - name: Setup Rust\n        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable\n\n      - name: Cache cargo registry\n        uses: actions/cache@v4\n        with:\n          path: |\n            ~/.cargo/registry\n            ~/.cargo/git\n            rust/target\n          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('rust/Cargo.lock') }}\n          restore-keys: |\n            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-\n\n      - name: Run tests\n        run: cargo test --all-features --verbose\n\n      - name: Run doc tests\n        run: cargo test --doc --verbose\n\n  # === BUILD ===\n  # Build package - only runs if lint and test pass\n  build:\n    name: Build Package",
      "numLines": 200,
      "startLine": 1,
      "totalLines": 366
    }
  }

when navigation is interrupted or fails.\"\"\"\n\n    pass\n\n\ndef is_navigation_error(error: Exception) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"Check if an error is a navigation-related error.\n\n    Args:\n        error: The exception to check\n\n    Returns:\n        True if this is a navigation error that should be handled gracefully\n    \"\"\"\n    if isinstance(error, NavigationError):\n        return True\n\n    error_message = str(error).lower()\n\n    # Common Playwright navigation error patterns\n    playwright_patterns = [\n        \"navigation\",\n        \"frame was detached\",\n        \"execution context was destroyed\",\n        \"target closed\",\n        \"page closed\",\n        \"browser closed\",\n        \"target crashed\",\n        \"context destroyed\",\n    ]\n\n    #
